description_long: This cabinetry ensemble features a modern, modular design with a combination of tall pantry units, base cabinets, and open shelving. The exterior is predominantly finished in a matte white, complemented by sections of light wood grain panels that add warmth and contrast. The cabinetry includes a built-in sink area, multiple storage compartments, and a workspace nook, making it suitable for utility or laundry room applications. The arrangement is L-shaped, maximizing storage and work surfaces along two adjoining walls. The doors and drawers are flat-fronted, with minimalistic finger groove handles for a sleek, contemporary look. The overall construction appears robust, with a mix of closed and open storage solutions for versatile urban use.
description: A modern L-shaped cabinetry set with matte white and light wood finishes, featuring tall pantry units, base cabinets, open shelving, and a built-in sink area. The design is sleek and functional, ideal for utility or laundry spaces.
description_view_0: This view highlights the L-shaped layout, showing the workspace nook, base cabinets, and the built-in sink area at the far end.
description_view_1: The tall pantry units and a variety of closed storage compartments are prominent, with open shelving visible on the left side.
description_view_2: A side perspective showing the depth of the cabinetry and the central sink area, with the open passage between the two main sections.
description_view_3: The rear of the cabinetry is mostly solid and unadorned, with only a small section of open shelving visible in the corner.
attribute_door_configuration: combination of double door, single door, and open shelf
